# AI API Docs

> AI 模型 API 文档集合。每个链接指向 markdown 格式的完整 API 文档，包含端点、参数、示例和计费。

## 阿里云百炼 - 万相 2.6

- [wan2.6 文生图](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.6/wan2.6-t2i.md): model_id=wan2.6-t2i, task=text-to-image, 同步/异步, 最高1440x1440, 0.20元/张
- [wan2.6 图生图](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.6/wan2.6-i2i.md): model_id=wan2.6-image, task=image-to-image, 单图编辑/多图融合/图文混合, 0.20元/张
- [wan2.6 文生视频](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.6/wan2.6-t2v.md): model_id=wan2.6-t2v, task=text-to-video, 2-15秒, 720P/1080P, 多镜头, 720P:0.6元/秒, 1080P:1元/秒
- [wan2.6 图生视频](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.6/wan2.6-i2v.md): model_id=wan2.6-i2v|wan2.6-i2v-flash, task=image-to-video, 2-15秒, flash有声0.3-0.5元/秒, flash无声0.15-0.25元/秒, 标准0.6-1元/秒
- [wan2.6 视频生视频](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.6/wan2.6-v2v.md): model_id=wan2.6-r2v|wan2.6-r2v-flash, task=reference-to-video, 2-10秒, flash有声0.3-0.5元/秒, flash无声0.15-0.25元/秒, 标准0.6-1元/秒

## 阿里云百炼 - 万相 2.5

- [wan2.5 文生图](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.5/wan2.5-t2i.md): model_id=wan2.5-t2i-preview, task=text-to-image, 异步, 512-1440px, 0.20元/张
- [wan2.5 图像编辑](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.5/wan2.5-i2i.md): model_id=wan2.5-i2i-preview, task=image-editing, 单图编辑/多图融合(最多3张), 0.220177元/张
- [wan2.5 文生视频](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.5/wan2.5-t2v.md): model_id=wan2.5-t2v-preview, task=text-to-video, 5/10秒, 480P:0.3元/秒, 720P:0.6元/秒, 1080P:1元/秒
- [wan2.5 图生视频](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/alibaba/wan2.5/wan2.5-i2v.md): model_id=wan2.5-i2v-preview, task=image-to-video, 5/10秒, 480P:0.3元/秒, 720P:0.6元/秒, 1080P:1元/秒

## 火山方舟（豆包） - Doubao Seed 对话模型

- [doubao-seed-2.0-pro](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-2.0-pro.md): model_id=doubao-seed-2-0-pro-260215, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/多模态/工具调用, 输入3.2元/百万token, 输出16.0-48.0元/百万token
- [doubao-seed-2.0-lite](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-2.0-lite.md): model_id=doubao-seed-2-0-lite-260215, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/多模态/工具调用, 输入0.6元/百万token, 输出3.6-10.8元/百万token
- [doubao-seed-2.0-mini](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-2.0-mini.md): model_id=doubao-seed-2-0-mini-260215, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/多模态/工具调用, 输入0.2元/百万token, 输出2.0-8.0元/百万token
- [doubao-seed-2.0-code-preview](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-2.0-code-preview.md): model_id=doubao-seed-2-0-code-preview-260215, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/多模态/工具调用, 输入3.2元/百万token, 输出16.0-48.0元/百万token
- [doubao-seed-1.8](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-1.8.md): model_id=doubao-seed-1-8-251228, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/多模态/工具调用/结构化输出, 输入0.80元/百万token, 输出2.00-24.00元/百万token
- [doubao-seed-1.6](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-1.6.md): model_id=doubao-seed-1-6-251015, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/多模态/工具调用/结构化输出, 输入0.80元/百万token, 输出2.00-24.00元/百万token
- [doubao-seed-1.6-lite](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-1.6-lite.md): model_id=doubao-seed-1-6-lite-251015, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/多模态/工具调用, 输入0.30元/百万token, 输出0.60-12.00元/百万token
- [doubao-seed-1.6-flash](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-1.6-flash.md): model_id=doubao-seed-1-6-flash-250828, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/视觉定位/多模态/工具调用/结构化输出, 输入0.15元/百万token, 输出1.50-6.00元/百万token
- [doubao-seed-1.6-vision](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/doubao-seed/doubao-seed-1.6-vision.md): model_id=doubao-seed-1-6-vision-250815, task=chat, 256k上下文, 深度思考/多模态/GUI任务/工具调用/结构化输出, 输入0.80元/百万token, 输出8.00-24.00元/百万token

## 火山方舟（豆包） - Seedance 视频生成

- [Seedance 2.0](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedance/seedance-2.0.md): model_id=doubao-seedance-2-0, task=音视图文混合参考/体验中心, 当前仅控制台免费体验, 模板库可查看REST示例代码, 正式API暂未开放
- [Seedance 1.5 Pro](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedance/seedance-1.5-pro.md): model_id=doubao-seedance-1-5-pro-251215, task=t2v/i2v/音频/draft, 4-12秒, 480p/720p/1080p, 有声16元/百万token, 无声8元/百万token
- [Seedance 1.0 Pro](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedance/seedance-1.0-pro.md): model_id=doubao-seedance-1-0-pro-250528, task=t2v/i2v, 2-12秒, 默认1080p, 15元/百万token
- [Seedance 1.0 Pro Fast](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedance/seedance-1.0-pro-fast.md): model_id=doubao-seedance-1-0-pro-fast-251015, task=t2v/i2v(首帧), 2-12秒, 默认1080p, 4.2元/百万token
- [Seedance 1.0 Lite T2V](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedance/seedance-1.0-lite-t2v.md): model_id=doubao-seedance-1-0-lite-t2v-250428, task=t2v, 2-12秒, 默认720p, 10元/百万token
- [Seedance 1.0 Lite I2V](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedance/seedance-1.0-lite-i2v.md): model_id=doubao-seedance-1-0-lite-i2v-250428, task=i2v(首帧/首尾帧/参考图), 2-12秒, 默认720p, 10元/百万token

## 火山方舟（豆包） - Seedream 图像生成

- [Seedream 5.0 Lite](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedream/seedream-5.0-lite.md): model_id=doubao-seedream-5-0-260128, task=t2i/i2i/组图/联网搜索, 最高4K, 0.22元/张
- [Seedream 4.5](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedream/seedream-4.5.md): model_id=doubao-seedream-4-5-251128, task=t2i/i2i/组图, 最高4K, 0.25元/张
- [Seedream 4.0](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/volcengine/seedream/seedream-4.0.md): model_id=doubao-seedream-4-0-250828, task=t2i/i2i/组图, 最高4K, 0.2元/张

## MiniMax（海螺） - Hailuo 视频生成

- [Hailuo-02](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/hailuo/hailuo-02.md): model_id=MiniMax-Hailuo-02, task=t2v/i2v/fl2v, 6-10秒, 512P/768P/1080P, 768P:2元/个, 1080P:3.5元/个, 512P:0.6元/个
- [Hailuo-2.3](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/hailuo/hailuo-2.3.md): model_id=MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3, task=t2v/i2v, 6-10秒, 768P/1080P, 768P:2元/个, 1080P:3.5元/个
- [Hailuo-2.3-Fast](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/hailuo/hailuo-2.3-fast.md): model_id=MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3-Fast, task=i2v, 6-10秒, 768P/1080P, 768P:1.35元/个, 1080P:2.31元/个, 速度提升2.5倍

## MiniMax（海螺） - M2.5 文本生成

- [MiniMax-M2.5](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/m2.5/minimax-m2.5.md): model_id=MiniMax-M2.5, task=chat, 204800上下文, Anthropic/OpenAI兼容, 深度思考/工具调用/流式输出, 输入$0.3/M tokens, 输出$1.2/M tokens, 500 RPM, 20000000 TPM

## MiniMax（海螺） - Speech 语音合成

- [Speech 2.8](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/speech/speech-2.8.md): model_id=speech-2.8-hd/speech-2.8-turbo, task=text-to-speech, 最新模型, 语气词标签, 40+语言, 300+音色, HD:3.5元/万字符, Turbo:2元/万字符
- [Speech 2.6](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/speech/speech-2.6.md): model_id=speech-2.6-hd/speech-2.6-turbo, task=text-to-speech, 优秀韵律, fluent/whisper情绪, HD:3.5元/万字符, Turbo:2元/万字符
- [Speech 02](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/speech/speech-02.md): model_id=speech-02-hd/speech-02-turbo, task=text-to-speech, 高稳定性, 增强小语种, HD:3.5元/万字符, Turbo:2元/万字符
- [语音克隆](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/speech/voice-clone.md): task=voice-clone, 10秒音频快速复刻音色, 9.9元/音色
- [语音设计](https://api-docs-9dh.pages.dev/minimax/speech/voice-design.md): task=voice-design, 文字描述生成音色, 9.9元/音色, 试听2元/万字符
